name: Gucci Mane & Keyshia Ka'oir: The Mane Event
original_name: Gucci Mane & Keyshia Ka'oir: The Mane Event
overview: Follows the twists and turns of the hip-hop power couple as they work to blend their families and defy the odds as they set to prepare for the most extravagant celebrity wedding of the year.

trailers.title: Gucci Mane and Keyshia Ka'oir: The Mane Event
